reasoning.upside: Activist pushing for strategic review/sale creates a hard catalyst with a defined timeline — this isn't "hope" investing, it's event-driven.
reasoning.risk: Activist campaigns can fizzle if the board resists or no buyers emerge; the Benefitfocus acquisition concern suggests operational complexity.

reasoning.upside: Raised guidance + accretive M&A + gross margin expansion is the trifecta; the stock has 15%+ 90-day return suggesting institutional re-rating is underway.
reasoning.risk: Apparel is cyclical and tariff-sensitive; the Marc Jacobs deal needs to close cleanly and tariff refund is a one-time benefit.

reasoning.upside: New England expansion adds a massive new addressable market; specialty grocery remains a secular share gainer vs. conventional supermarkets.
reasoning.risk: Kroger's aggressive price cuts could compress comps; valuation was previously stretched, so this "dip" may just be normalization.

reasoning.upside: LTL pricing power returning as capacity tightens; digital platform launch (ArcBest View) adds a recurring revenue narrative.
reasoning.risk: Freight is notoriously cyclical — if macro deteriorates on Iran escalation or Fed hawkishness, this rolls over fast.

reasoning.upside: AI data center power demand is a multi-year secular tailwind; Entergy's southern U.S. territory is ground zero for hyperscaler buildouts through 2029.
reasoning.risk: Morgan Stanley just trimmed PT to $94 — not everyone agrees on the magnitude of the data center benefit; rising rates pressure utility valuations.
